name: browser-agent
description: AIOS plugin for headless web browsing, scraping, OCR, screenshots, file downloads, and web search with proxy rotation and session persistence.
author: AI Operating System Contributors

playwright.description: Required for JavaScript-rendered pages, screenshots, and advanced browsing
playwright.install: pip install playwright && playwright install chromium

pytesseract.description: Tesseract OCR backend for text extraction from images/PDFs
pytesseract.install: pip install pytesseract && apt-get install -y tesseract-ocr

pdf2image.description: PDF to image conversion for OCR
pdf2image.install: pip install pdf2image && apt-get install -y poppler-utils

ocr_backend.description: OCR engine to use. 'auto' tries tesseract > easyocr > paddleocr.

proxy_max_failures.description: Max failures before marking a proxy as unusable.

session_expiration.description: Default session TTL in seconds (24 hours).

installation.quick: pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install playwright && playwright install chromium
installation.full: pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install playwright pytesseract easyocr pdf2image && playwright install chromium && apt-get install -y tesseract-ocr poppler-utils
